meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Master Claude Code: Scale Your Projects Beyond Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Break through your coding plateau. Learn the Claude Code skills setup to architect complex, production-ready apps using Antigravity and AI-driven workflows.
content.answer_block: To move beyond basic apps, you must integrate Claude Code into an autonomous development loop. By combining Claude's reasoning with Antigravity’s structural orchestration, you transform from a coder into an AI-augmented architect, capable of scaffolding, testing, and iterating on complex features in minutes rather than hours.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks chasing syntax errors in tutorial projects, feeling the friction of the 'tutorial hell' plateau. The code you write works, but it feels fragile, disconnected, and dangerously simple. You are standing on the edge of professional engineering, but your current manual workflow is the only thing tethering you to mediocrity.

It is time to shed the manual labor of boilerplate generation. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop fighting the compiler and start orchestrating intelligence. This is the transition from writing code to engineering systems, allowing you to prototype at the speed of thought and build a portfolio that commands respect in the industry.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by configuring your workspace to handle AI-assisted development, ensuring your local environment syncs perfectly with Claude Code's execution context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and propose a production-ready directory architecture that supports modular AI-driven feature development.

steps.title: Contextual Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define the business logic of your app before writing a single line of code, ensuring the AI understands the 'why' behind your architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive schema and API contract for a multi-user SaaS application with role-based authentication.

steps.title: Autonomous Feature Implementation
steps.description: Shift the implementation burden to Claude Code by providing high-level requirements, allowing it to write, test, and refine complex feature modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a secure JWT authentication flow based on the schema generated in step 2, including error handling and edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication controller with validation'

steps.title: Automated Testing Loops
steps.description: Never ship broken code. Integrate automated testing commands to ensure every Claude-generated feature meets your specific quality benchmarks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of unit tests for the authentication module that covers happy paths and security vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create jest tests for auth.controller.ts'

steps.title: Refactoring and Optimization
steps.description: Use the combined power of AI reasoning to identify performance bottlenecks and clean up technical debt automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest refactoring patterns to improve response times.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor service layer for better memory management'

pro_tips: Always provide the 'system intent' in your Antigravity prompts to keep the AI aligned with your specific software architecture goals.
Use Claude Code's `--verbose` flag during initial setup to understand exactly how the AI interacts with your file system.
Maintain a 'context.md' file in your root directory; Claude Code reads this to understand your project's history and coding standards.
Break large features into tiny, atomic tasks for the CLI; AI performs significantly better on 5-line logic changes than 500-line refactors.
Use the `--no-interactive` flag in production deployment scripts to automate your CI/CD pipeline once your code is stable.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is live, implement a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automate your deployment cycle, making your project truly professional-grade.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student following tutorials; you are an AI-augmented developer building the future. Your portfolio is the only currency that matters in this industry, and you now have the tools to make it world-class. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
